message:
docs: update README license references to MIT + OpenAI/Anthropic Rider

files.patch: @@ -6,7 +6,7 @@ *Fortifying Large Language Models against sophisticated prompt injection attacks* -[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT) +[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT%2BOpenAI%2FAnthropic%20Rider-blue.svg)](./LICENSE) [![Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/version-1.3-blue.svg)](#acip-v13--whats-new-and-why) @@ -731,7 +731,7 @@ The manifest includes SHA256 checksums, file sizes, and line counts for all vers ## License -This repository is released under the MIT License. +This repository is released under the MIT License (with OpenAI/Anthropic Rider). ---
